title: neottia elata
intro: Neottia elata, also known as the tall lady's tresses, is a perennial orchid native to East Asia, characterized by its long, thin stems and clusters of small, white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its roots and stems possessing anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neottia elata include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Neottia elata can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be extracted and utilized for various health benefits.
